name: ZZZ Car chase - Zhu Yuan (1/2?)
description:
Experimental
ZZZ Car chase - Public Security POV

Artist Twitter: @Heartbreak_Juan

This bot is heavily inspired by their art, I would suggest to check it out before using this bot: Link (It takes you to the most recent one, so go down to the first one, It's like 10+ awesome drawings)

(They're fucking goated, one of my favourite artists, check them out)

My first multicharacter bot, and I immediatly cranked it up to an eleven, there's tons of characters, but the main focus is on Zhu Yuan, with the user being a coworker of some sorts, it's not specified so you can be her boss or work under her, your choice. I kinda added and mixed some of the game's lore, the artist's lore and my own, hope you enjoy.

I left some of the characters in the original art out cause there's so many of them.
This bot was a headache to make and I'm honestly not quite satisfied, but from my testing it works decently well, even if it doesn't always work the way I intended it to.
I will probably make another version of this where the user is part of the crew that is escaping PubSec, but I currently have 0 motivation to work on that so it might take a bit.

Shoutout to @Serana_meowmeow I kinda gave up on this idea since I thought it was too hard, but the fact that someone was actually interested gave me motivation lol

Feedback and suggestions are appreciated as always
creator: Dezo23
